content: Did you borrow a support yet
Current poison team is G:Doll Myriam Nymphaea, Farros. If I ever get 24, who's leaving?

24

(Jokes aside, farros)
Thanks.
There's a level 78 nymphaea there so would assume so
Gratz!
Oh
Did not zoom in LOL
Did you spend money on the game? <@219965546874142720> You already quite a lot of limited chars
current team is tawil, hameln, Gmurphy, corposant is this a good team for cleaning chapter 8 and who should I focus on building
i have a lot of unbuilt characters so if there’s anyone I should replace I can probably replace them

Hi! I've started a week ago, kind of. 
I'm not great at team building, so I wanted some help! 

This are my Awakeners, I wanted to make a Jenkin team or 24, but anyting goes. 

I didn't put money on the account but I'm not intrested in doing so, and I'm really early in the story, early 4th chapter, because I like doing drafts and pvps more, so I have farmable resources still.
 
Thanks!
You can probably get something going with Jenkins Clementine Aigis Faint
this is a good team for ch8 and ch9
What's the idea behind it, so I can use it better?
also what are the covenants I should use bc rn I only use the death res mountain one

Tawil is main dps, put either dreams of medicine so you get more wings, or a crit covenant like crimson pulse

Gmurphy scales with keyflare so make her your keyflare bot. Put life drain and keyflare wheels

Corpo should hold death resist as her shield and damage scale with it, making her the best dr holder

Hameln can be whatever, you only use him for rouse really. He can hold more death resist, or deus ex machina, or w/e
Ahh thank you!!

Quasar Clementine's Cards (play first) so that you can gain Perm Strength, when possible throw in Jenkin's Rat Swarm into the Ultra Space, apply Vulnerable with Aigis 1-Cost and hit the Enemy while they are Vulnerable with her 3-Cost (it refunds,) funnel Embryos into Jenkins & Aigis for Nuke Turns (use Aigis first to apply Vulnerable), stall Turns with Faint Strength Down and you can also funnel Embryos into her throughout your Run to stack Death Resistance. Oh yeah, and when you're using Aigis Exalt, make sure to use it while you have an Embryo available in your Hand so that it triggers Devour (or consumes it) to Petrify (or Stun) all Enemies temporarily

snorlax already gave you a jenkin team so here's a 24 team. 24 miryam nymphaea faros

This is a poison team where you smack the boss with thousands of poison from aequor 24 manic exalt and then trigger it with the 3 supports
miryam helps battery 24 to exalt more
Thank you both! I'll work getting those done, Miryam is carring me from the start
Can't reccomrnd dreams to new ppl btw
Yh np man, sorry about the long convuluted paragraph

content: yes, ins second team
do E3 Gmurphy, e2 tawil, e2 Myriam and GRamona work together well?
Yes it's not a bad team
Gmurphy is a good support for tawil
most people run hameln too
tawil is much stronger with hameln
Any reccomendations for this mouch glaze team?
why nautila wheel lol
need to retain all those 100 shield u will be making with devour
put crimson pulse on mouchette and burial ground on everyone else
tbh u might overcap crit rate with those wheels
so maybe 4 burial grounds is the play
if u have access to dreams of medicine then use that
on mouchette
Do not use dreams in train mode*
Also Faint could be replaced by Aigis if you do not really plan to proc dr
Or well by just anyone else who doesn't brick team
i like xu in train
as generic defensive support
If arc 1 also use costco at helot and 4th slot
Tbh Mouch seemed bad in train mode for me considering Whaled one used (Hard mode)
Maybe i should've try some Faint 2000% dr shenanigans instead of Aigis. Thought she won't help that much at mob stages
Compared to Aigis stun
Anyway Gmuppet dmg felt extremely higher
yea mouchette lowkey not that good in train
dps with sustain is better
and dps that doesnt randomly get screwed by counter bosses
Barely made it to last boss sometimes using mouch OE just for stun
And arc2 chapter 3 boss got me there
At his second 3 lives
Drowning in crimson?
Crimson Pulse, you obtain it from the Badges Shop
She can do ok damage too with just a few poison relics
she can nuke with ult if you stack her debuff
I did like a mil
Sad unga bungas
Hey! Recommend me which one works best as e0 option pls?
And if Doll shares upgrades with original doll same way as GRamona does with normal Ramona
Mouchette, can be used immediately at E0, with E2 being her first & most ideal breakpoint followed by E3 which adds on a lot of Damage
Thanks!
Wc man
No, Only Ramona and Gramona do that. The other genesis versions are completely separate from the original
